danger_signals.visual_form: Mechanical, artificial structures; dark metallic machines; orange/red energy signatures; artificial gravity tubes
danger_signals.meaning: Active alien threat; hostile environment; life-draining zone

danger_signals.visual_form: Lunar Bay stripped of all ocean life; barren underwater landscapes; absence of fauna
danger_signals.meaning: Vortex feeding activity; ecological collapse; high danger zone

danger_signals.visual_form: Transformable mechanical entities; hostile creatures with Vortex Queen visual markers
danger_signals.meaning: Active combat threats; patrolling enemy forces

danger_signals.visual_form: Falling debris in caves; dynamic world disruption; Asterite death indicated by environmental instability
danger_signals.meaning: Loss of protective power; world state degradation

danger_signals.visual_form: Lifeless planet-spanning machines; water tubes; artificial environments; no natural life
danger_signals.meaning: Failed timeline; existential threat outcome; complete ecosystem collapse

safety_signals.visual_form: Friendly dolphins clustered together; peaceful communication behavior
safety_signals.meaning: Allied faction; safe social zone; resource for collective action

safety_signals.visual_form: Flying dolphins; natural water pathways through sky; evolved, peaceful ecosystem
safety_signals.meaning: Positive timeline; hope state; goal world-state

safety_signals.visual_form: Crystal spheres scattered throughout levels; glowing collectibles
safety_signals.meaning: Power restoration; healing progression; puzzle completion

safety_signals.visual_form: Traditional underwater spaces with fauna; caves, reefs, natural structures
safety_signals.meaning: Uncontaminated zone; lower threat; ecological health

safety_signals.visual_form: Visual shift from barren to populated; emergence of ocean life during final battle
safety_signals.meaning: World state healing; collective victory condition; ecosystem recovery

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Cetacean form; Ecco as protagonist identifier
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Future dolphins have long fins, helium sacs, visible telekinetic auras
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Pod gathering locations; underwater caves; peaceful ocean zones; Lunar Bay as final rally point

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Vortex Queen as visual centerpiece; mechanical drone forms; artificial geometric patterns
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Drones (transformable into seagull, jellyfish, shark, school of fish visual mockery); Giant moray eels (infected/corrupted); Vortex creatures unique to dark future
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Mechanical structures; water tube networks; stripped ecosystems; Moray Abyss (infestation zone); Vortex New Machine (final stronghold)

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Crystal globes; glowing spiritual presence; non-corporeal entity
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Asterite resting places; locations where globes are found; connection to time machine lore; Atlantis (origin point)

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Natural underwater caves; peaceful ocean exploration possible; crystal glyphs functional
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Ecco has full power set; pod communicates normally; no immediate threats visible

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Avalanche event; environmental instability; visual indicator of power loss (air requirement returns)
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Ecco must surface for air; fellows describe spreading fear; immediate vulnerability

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Moray Abyss infestation; giant corrupted eels; pockets of mechanical influence spreading
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Pod is fearful; Trellia appears as descendant messenger; temporal anomalies begin

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Sky waterways; evolved dolphins with visible flight adaptations; lush interconnected world; peaceful fauna
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Dolphins cooperate; environment is safe; 'old friend' Asterite guides; world appears healed

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Lifeless mechanical planet; water tubes as infrastructure; artificial gravity; sterile aesthetic; total ecosystem death
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Only Vortex creatures present; no natural life; hostile environment; maze-like navigation; Vortex Queen nest chambers

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Repopulated ocean; visual shift from barren to alive; pod rally visible; New Machine intrusion visible
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Pod engages collectively; Ecco infiltrates while allies fight; Vortex Queen confrontation triggers; time is split visually

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Atlantis revealed; Time Machine visible; Vortex Queen as larva (visual form change); prehistoric era glimpsed
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Victory celebration occurs; Ecco tasked with machine destruction; Vortex Queen escapes temporally; cycle potentially reset

environmental_storytelling.example: Lunar Bay stripped of all ocean life by Vortex feeding—absence of fauna tells story of predation and threat level
Bright future shows flying dolphins and sky waterways vs. dark future's sterile machines—visual contrast encodes timeline moral alignment
Collectible globes scattered across levels represent world fragmentation; gathering them restores cosmic balance visually and narratively
Natural underwater caves vs. artificial mechanical tubes—building style immediately communicates ally vs. enemy territory
Giant moray eels in Moray Abyss indicate Vortex infestation; creature size and behavior shift show infection progression
Future dolphins' long fins and visible telekinetic auras distinguish evolved forms; visual design encodes time period and species advancement
Asterite's globe recovery corresponds to world state improvement; visual feedback loops between item collection and ecosystem stability

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Can attack from distance via sonar; no air requirement; full capability set active
Must surface for air; reduced attack options; vulnerability increases; reactive movement pattern
Cluster together; communicate through sonar; engage in gameplay puzzles (maze following)
Spread fear communication; send messenger (Trellia); prepare for collective final battle; visible anxiety in positioning
Ambush Ecco at Lunar Bay; transformable into multiple animal forms (seagull, jellyfish, shark, fish school); combat-focused movement
Moves between timelines; feeds on Asterite and ocean life; defensive in chambers; uses time machine tactically; transforms to larva when defeated
Enlarged beyond natural size; aggressive territorial defense; nest in Moray Abyss; indicate Vortex presence through abnormal behavior
Cannot communicate until globes reassembled; gradually regains speech capability; guides from oracle position once restored; initiates collective defense
Appears as descendant with visual distinction (long fins); facilitates time travel; connects present to bright future; shows alliance

notes: Ecco: The Tides of Time uses strong visual and behavioral contrasts to communicate world-state: natural vs. mechanical, alive vs. dead, powered vs. vulnerable. The faction system (Dolphins vs. Vortex vs. Asterite) is encoded through environmental architecture, entity design, and behavioral markers. Danger signals concentrate on ecosystem death, mechanical corruption, and power loss. Safety signals emphasize collective action, natural environments, and power restoration. The dual-timeline narrative (bright future vs. dark future) is central to how the game manifests political/existential stakes visually. Time manipulation serves as primary mechanic linking narrative world-state to gameplay.
